# Kanon MCP tool catalog

Discoverable index of the `mcp__kanon__*` tool family — 0 tools derived from `crates/angelos/src/server/*.rs`. Run `kanon derive --apply --only mcp-catalog-sync` to regenerate after adding or removing `#[tool(...)]` annotations.

> **MCP-first contract:** prefer MCP tools for forge, code-intelligence, dispatch, planning, and knowledge-substrate operations. The kanon CLI and curl-to-`:7878` are fallbacks for resilience when the MCP server is unreachable. Failed MCP calls record an actionable error; capture them in dispatch reports under `process_observations.mcp_failure_modes`.

Full per-tool parameter schemas are available via protocol introspection. This catalog is the redundant tier — shape-and-routing reference derived from the canonical source in `crates/angelos/src/server/*.rs`. When in doubt about parameter shape, ask the protocol for the schema.

## Routing — when to reach for what

| Workflow | First reach | If MCP unreachable / errored |
|---|---|---|
| Read forge issue body | `mcp__kanon__issue_get` | `curl /api/v1/repos/<o>/<r>/issues/<N>` |
| Comment on forge issue | `mcp__kanon__issue_comment` | `curl POST /api/v1/repos/<o>/<r>/issues/<N>/comments` |
| Update forge issue title/body/labels | `mcp__kanon__issue_update` | `kanon issue update <N> ...` |
| Close forge issue | `mcp__kanon__issue_close` | `curl POST /comments` then `curl POST /close` |
| Open PR | `mcp__kanon__pr_open` | `curl POST /api/v1/prs/<o>/<r>` (kanon shape, not GH) |
| Read PR detail | `mcp__kanon__pr_get` | `curl /api/v1/repos/<o>/<r>/pulls/<N>` |
| Merge PR | `mcp__kanon__pr_repo_merge` or `mcp__kanon__pr_merge` | `kanon pr merge <N>` (CLI) |
| Find Rust symbol | `mcp__kanon__code_symbol_query` | grep with `kanon lint` confirmation |
| Compute blast radius | `mcp__kanon__code_blast_audit` | `cargo metadata` + manual reasoning |
| Hybrid search over knowledge | `mcp__kanon__mnemosyne_hybrid_query` | (no shell equivalent) |
| Capture or promote lesson | `mcp__kanon__lesson_new` / `_promote` | `kanon lesson new` / `kanon lesson promote` |
| Run lesson meta-review sweep | `mcp__kanon__meta_review` | `kanon meta-review` |
| Run quality gate | `mcp__kanon__gate_check` | `kanon gate` (CLI) |
| Lint changed files | `mcp__kanon__lint_check` | `kanon lint --summary <each-file>` (CLI; one path/call) |
| Sync derived agent docs | `mcp__kanon__docs_sync` | `kanon docs sync --check/--apply` (CLI) |
| Locate registered path intent | `mcp__kanon__config_location_get` / `_list` | `kanon locate <intent>` / `kanon locate --list` |
| Record a meeting transcript | `mcp__kanon__transcript_record` | (no shell equivalent — fleet pipeline only) |
| Track dispatch run | `mcp__kanon__dispatch_start` / `_list` / `_status` | `kanon dispatch ...` (CLI, richer) |

| Render Jinja dispatch template | CLI-only (`kanon dispatch render`) | not yet planned for MCP |
